evals.expected_output: A folder named 'superpowers/' containing an index.html file with a Three.js-powered explainer page about the Superpowers AI coding tool. Should have 4 sections: hero with stats, problem it solves, 3D architecture diagram, and usage instructions.

evals.prompt: hey can you make me a cool visual page for this repo? https://github.com/ollama/ollama I want to understand what it does
evals.expected_output: A folder named 'ollama/' containing an index.html file with a Three.js-powered explainer page about Ollama. Should accurately describe Ollama as a tool for running LLMs locally, show its architecture (model management, API server, etc), and include installation/usage steps.

A folder named 'pydantic/' containing an index.html file with a Three.js-powered explainer page about Pydantic. Should explain data validation in Python, show how validators/models/serialization work in the 3D diagram, and include pip install + basic model usage example.
